title: Ascent Skill Taxonomy
description: Controlled vocabulary of skills referenced by parsed _must/_nice/_bene fields and resume parser output. See V2_SPECS.md (skill taxonomy spec) for governance.

lastReviewed.description: ISO date of the most recent curation pass.

corpusSource.description: Provenance of the corpus that seeded this taxonomy.

skills.description: Canonical skill list. Ordered alphabetically by canonical name to keep diffs readable.

canonical.description: Lowercase, alphanumeric, hyphens only. Examples: pytorch, vector-db, rag, distributed-training. Mirrors V2_SPECS guidance.

display.description: Human-facing label. Defaults to a title-cased version of canonical if omitted.

category.description: Coarse grouping. 'soft' is for non-technical skills (communication, leadership) only when they appear materially in _must.

aliases.description: Variants the parser must recognize and map to canonical. Examples for pytorch: ['torch', 'py torch', 'pytorch lightning']. Lowercase strings; spaces, +, #, dots, slashes allowed (matches normalized parser tokens).

deprecates.description: Prior canonical names this entry replaces. Migrations read this to rewrite stored UserProfile docs.

introducedAt.description: When this canonical was added. Helps audit taxonomy growth over time.

notes.description: Curation notes — why a tricky decision was made (e.g., 'transformers' is a library; the architecture is 'transformer-architecture').
